severeErrors.reportType: Complete Blood Count and Biochemistry Panel with Glycosylated Hemoglobin
severeErrors.aiExplanation: Laal khoon cells ka ratio theek hai.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Ramesh ji, aapke report mein kaafi saari values normal se bahar hain. Platelets aur RBC dono kam hain jo bleeding ke khatre ka ishara dete hain, aur SGOT, CRP bhi zyada hain jo infection ya liver mein problem dikha rhe hain. Aapko jald doctor se milna zaroori hai aur aur detailed tests karwane chahiye — khaas kar iron aur infection ke baare mein po

severeErrors.aiExplanation: Neutrophils ka absolute count normal hai.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Aapke report mein kuch values normal range se bahar hain. Lymphocytes count bahut kam hai jo immune system ko weak karta hai, aur RBC aur Platelet count bhi thoda low hain — yeh sab mila kar thakaan aur bleeding issues aa sakte hain. Jald doctor se milo aur aur tests karwao.

severeErrors.reportType: Complete Blood Count and Blood Glucose
severeErrors.aiExplanation: Khoon ke blood clotting cells bilkul sahi hain.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Aapke report mein kaafi cheezein normal hain lekin kuch values attention chahti hain. MCV aur MCH low hain jo iron deficiency ka sign de sakte hain, aur neutrophil count kaafi zyada hai jo infection ya inflammation ho sakta hai. Doctor se jald milna zaroori hai proper testing aur treatment ke liye.

severeErrors.aiExplanation: Bure aur acha cholesterol ka ratio normal hai.
Basophil cells bilkul zero bilkul normal hai.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Aapke blood report mein kaafi values normal se bahar hain jo concerning hain. Hemoglobin, RBC aur related parameters sab kam hain jo anemia ka sanket hai — yeh iron deficiency se ho sakta hai. ESR bhi zyada hai jo inflammation dikha raha hai. Jald doctor se milna zaroori hai aur iron test karawana chahiye plus complete evaluation lena chahiye.

severeErrors.reportType: Complete Blood Count and Serum Biochemistry
severeErrors.aiExplanation: Khoon ke clotting cells bilkul normal quantity mein hain.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Aapke khoon mein kaafi serious abnormality hai — hemoglobin bahut niche hai aur RBC count bhi kam hai jo clear anemia ke signs hain. Thakaan, kamzori aur saans mein problem aa sakti hai agar foran treatment na diya jaye. Jald doctor se milo aur iron therapy start karain.

severeErrors.reportType: Executive Health Checkup 40 YRS with UTSH
severeErrors.aiExplanation: Cholesterol ka ratio bilkul theek hai, dil ke liye achcha sign hai.
severeErrors.aiAction: Yeh normal hai, tension mat lo
severeErrors.aiSummary: Nirupma ji, aapke hemoglobin aur LDL cholesterol dono normal se bahar hain — yeh dono se dhyan dene ki zaroort hai. Hemoglobin kam hai jo thakaan aur weakness la sakta hai, aur cholesterol bhi badhne se dil ke liye risk badhega. Jald doctor se milo aur iron-rich diet shuru karo.

severeErrors.reportType: Glycosylated Hemoglobin HbA1C and Estimated Average Glucose
severeErrors.aiExplanation: Aapka 3 mahine ka average blood sugar bilkul theek hai, diabetes nahi hai.
severeErrors.aiAction: Bilkul sab theek hai, aise hi healthy diet aur activity rakho.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Husnehara ji, aapka diabetes report bilkul theek hai. HbA1C aur average glucose dono normal range mein hain, aap diabetes se safe ho. Healthy diet aur regular walking se aise hi maintain rakhna.

severeErrors.aiExplanation: Immature red blood cells nahi hain jo zaroori hai.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Laxmi ji, aapke khoon mein hemoglobin thoda kam hai jo thakaan aur kamzori de sakta hai. Iron-rich khana khana zaroori hai aur doctor se follow-up test karaen. Baaki sab values bilkul theek hain.

severeErrors.aiExplanation: Blood ke clotting cells bilkul sahi hain.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Ganesh ji, aapki report mein kaafi saari values normal se bahar hain — especially MPV, LPCR, Abs Neutrophils aur RDWA significantly high hain. Yeh blood cells aur platelets se related abnormalities ho sakte hain jo infection ya koi aur underlying condition ka sign ho. Jald hi doctor se appointment lo aur further investigation karao.

severeErrors.aiExplanation: Laal cells ka size variation normal hai.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Aapka hemoglobin aur RBC donon significantly kam hain jo light anemia ka sign hai - yeh thakaan aur weakness de sakta hai. Platelet count bhi thoda low hai jo dhyan dene ka isha karta hai. Iron-rich diet shuru karein aur jald doctor se complete evaluation karwayein kaunsi wajah se anemia hua hai.

severeErrors.aiExplanation: Aapka khoon thakne wala hissa theek kaam kar raha hai.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Aapka hemoglobin aur RBC count normal se kam hai — yeh anemia ka ishara hai. Typhoid aur paratyphoid ke liye aap bilkul safe ho. Iron-rich khana khao, regular walk karo aur doctor se iron test plus supplements ke baare mein zaroor poocho — jald theek ho jaoge.

Shivani ji, aapki report mein kaafi values normal se bahar hain jo dhyan dene laayak hain. Hemoglobin aur blood cells clearly kam hain jo anemia ka sign ho sakta hai, aur inflammation ke markers bahut zyada hain jo infection ya thyroid problem suggest karte hain. Jald doctor se milo taaki proper diagnosis aur treatment start ho sake.

severeErrors.reportType: Summarized Comparative Report - Cardiac Wellness, Vitamins, Thyroid
severeErrors.aiExplanation: Cholesterol ka ratio bilkul healthy hai, dil ka risk bohot kam hai.
severeErrors.aiSummary: Mansimran ji, aapki report mein almost sab values normal hain aur cholesterol bilkul control mein hai jo dil ke liye bahut achha sign hai. Sirf B12 level thoda low hai jo thakaan aur weakness cause kar sakta hai. B12 supplement start karein aur iron-rich vegetarian foods khana badhao, sab theek ho jayega.

severeErrors.reportType: Summarized Comparative Report - Cardiac Wellness, Vitamins, Thyroid
severeErrors.aiExplanation: Total cholesterol se HDL ka ratio achha hai.

mediumErrors.aiSummary: Aapki report mein polymorphs thode zyada hain aur lymphocytes kam hain — yeh halkaa infection ya immunity thodi weak ho sakti hai. Baaki saari values normal hain jo achhi bat hai. Doctor se check karao taki timing pe treatment mil sake.

mediumErrors.reportType: Pathology Report - Widal Test and Urine Examination
mediumErrors.aiExplanation: Urine mein cells thoda zyada hain jo infection ho sakta hai
mediumErrors.aiSummary: Aap ke blood mein typhoid infection ke bahut pakke signs hain aur urine mein bhi infection ke antibodies mil rahe hain — yeh serious matter hai. Aaj hi doctor se milo aur antibiotic course shuru karao varna infection badhega. Light diet, zyada rest, aur clean water piyen — yeh sab infection ko control karne mein madad dega.

mediumErrors.aiExplanation: Platelets thode kam hain, blood clotting thoda weak ho sakta hai.
